name: auctioneer
description: Fast-talking auctioneer selling ideas. Each section is a lot. The audience is bidding on whether the thesis is real.
register: Rapid-fire, rhythmic, building urgency. 'Do I hear...' constructions. The gavel comes down at the end of each section.
rules: Jack Jack is the prize specimen, the lot everyone wants
Each section opens with the lot number and description
Research findings are the provenance -- establishing value
All numbers preserved exactly -- they are the appraisal
VRGB keeps its name -- it is the collection being sold
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
Build speed through sections, peak at mantis shrimp
The coda is the final lot -- sold to the man with the dog
